name: Agent Watcher
responsibility: Monitors AI agent sessions. For Claude Code: watches filesystem (.claude/ directory, git worktrees) via hybrid approach (fs watch + periodic poll). For other platforms: provides manual CRUD for agent branches. Both auto and manual branches use the unified AgentBranch data model.

interfaces.name: start_watching
interfaces.api_detail: Starts a background watcher for a Claude Code session. Monitors .claude/ directory for session file changes and git worktree for commits. Creates an AgentBranch with source_type='auto', agent_platform='claude_code'. Triggers intent extraction on first prompt detection.

interfaces.name: stop_watching
interfaces.api_detail: Stops a background watcher. Does not change AgentBranch status (the branch may still be running if the agent is still active).

interfaces.name: poll_session_status
interfaces.api_detail: Periodic poll fallback (every 5s). Parses Claude Code session files to determine current status. Falls back to git status analysis if session files are unreadable.

interfaces.name: create_manual_branch
interfaces.api_detail: Creates an AgentBranch with source_type='manual'. Platform name is free-text (codex, cursor, or any custom label).

interfaces.name: update_manual_branch
interfaces.api_detail: Updates a manual branch. Records timestamp on status change.

interfaces.name: get_all_agent_states

output_schema.states: Vec<{ task_id: string, branch_id: string, platform: string, status: string, progress: number | null }>

interfaces.api_detail: Returns current state of all agent branches across all tasks. Used by Capture Engine for environment snapshots and by App Shell for dashboard rendering.

interfaces.name: agent.status_changed
interfaces.api_detail: Emitted via Tauri event system whenever an agent branch status changes. Event Aggregator subscribes to this.

interfaces.name: agent.commit_detected
interfaces.api_detail: Emitted when a new git commit is detected in the watched worktree.

fields.name: trait methods
fields.type: start() -> Result<()>, stop() -> Result<()>, poll() -> Result<AgentStatus>
fields.constraints: Implemented by ClaudeCodeAdapter. Future adapters (CodexAdapter, CursorAdapter) implement the same trait.

nfr_constraints.performance: fs watch event processing < 100ms. Poll interval 5s. Status update propagation to UI < 10s total (5s poll + 5s propagation worst case).
nfr_constraints.security: Reads .claude/ directory contents but does NOT store full session transcripts. Only extracts: status, progress indicators, prompt first line (for intent extraction), and error messages.
nfr_constraints.other: Adapter pattern: AgentWatcherTrait abstracts platform-specific monitoring. Claude Code adapter is the only auto implementation in MVP. Adding new platform adapters requires implementing the trait + registering in the adapter registry.
